text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear about a scrimmage taking place<n>today. As I
have some free time, I<n>head over to watch.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Upon arriving...

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho! Get to the track! The<n>scrimmage is
about to start!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I don't wanna.

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! You're<n>already
signed up to race!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...No. I don't wanna race. Leave me<n>alone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Goodness. Someone's grumpy<n>today.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Are you here to tell me to race too?<n>Well, it's not
gonna work.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel like racing so I'm not<n>gonna, and
that's that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You don't feel like it, huh? Well,<n>maybe we can
do something about<n>that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Look, Sweep. Don't you want this?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait! Could those be...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I guess Sweep's not coming.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like she's having some kinda<n>spat up
there. Even if she did come,<n>she probably
wouldn't put up a good<n>fight.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
True... Well, that's one less person<n>we have to
keep our eyes out for.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Well, whatever. Guess I'll just haveto crush you instead!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Guess she came after all. Allright, now it's a real match!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As the other competitors grow<n>impatient, Sweep
Tosho finally takes<n>her position. Then...

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet has taken the lead with<n>Vodka
close behind! Looks like it's<n>come down to these
two!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Today's going to be my day to<n>shiiine!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No, it's gonna be miiine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The two are neck and neck. And just<n>when it
looks like no one can threaten<n>their lead...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Vodka and Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What the?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Including Scarlet and Vodka, that's<n>five people in
front of me. Now four!<n>Now three!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(If I let it rip now, I'll take the lead<n>without
breaking a sweat!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Today's winner's gonna be...<n>MEEEE!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... YES!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Look! This is my true magical power!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No way. I thought you weren't in the<n>mood?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I had a change of heart when<n>Air Groove
promised me a certain<n>something before the
race.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait! Could those be...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. The flower seeds you've been<n>wanting.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Gimme!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll do it! I'll run for real! I'll give it my<n>ultra best
shot!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Flower seeds?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You got motivated by seeds?!That doesn't make any sense!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! Yes, it does! Quit<n>bashing seeds!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I thought she'd be stuck way behind<n>us, but she
caught up so fast.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...We really underestimated her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All it took for Sweep Tosho to unleash<n>a blistering
final sprint was a change<n>of mood. Maybe the
world really can<n>change on a girl's slightest
whim.
